name: Arms Race

abilities.name: Loaded for Later
abilities.text: When this model would discard an Improvised Enhancement upgrade, it may instead remove an Impact or Adaptable token.

actions.name: Raid Remnant
actions.effects: This model may remove a Remains marker within 3" to gain an Adaptable token. Attach an Improvised Enhancement upgrade to the target.

triggers.name: Unnatural Reflexes
triggers.text: Declare this action again, targeting a different model, ignoring "once per" restrictions.

extraction_notes: Card shows Ophelia LaCroix, Red Cage Raider as the associated master
Loaded for Later is a passive ability granted to all Friendly Kin models
Raid Remnant is a Tactical Action granted only to Friendly unique Kin models
Action has Signature icon (indicated by ¶ symbol)
Remains marker referenced but not defined on this card (likely defined elsewhere)
